type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The average N concentration of the raw material increased from 92.5 ppm(1999) to 181.5 ppm (2000). There was a compensating factor in that we produced a Food Grade variation of our two main products that consumed raw material with a 3.7 ppm N content.

In late July 1999, 16 tonnes of dirty phosphorus was sold as a raw material for the production of phosphate fertilizer. Later inthe fall, and early winter 1999, an additional 85.3 tonnes of dirty phosphorus was sold to the same compan

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment:
We are in the process of organizing the removal of contaminated phosphorusì
from our storage tanks and sending it to South Africa for recycle.  We ì
estimate a total of 97 tonnes will be processed, 1999 - 2001.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

1 Our operating hours were +30% above 1997.
2 Our plans were to shut thisunit down in 1998, however the new pilot ì

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
We are early in the process of evaluating these emissions ,therefore at ì
this time we are not able to estimate 1998 etc., other than to say ì
emissions will fluctuate with the impurities in the raw materials,and the ì
totaltonnes consumed.
